name: Chile (State PKI)

authority.name: Autoridad Certificadora del Estado de Chile — Ministerio Secretaría General de la Presidencia (SEGPRES)
authority.operator: Estado de Chile — organismos públicos (ministerios, universidades estatales, servicios, gobiernos regionales)

governingLaw: Ley 19.799 (2002) · DFL / normativa de firma electrónica del Estado
notes: Chile's STATE PKI (distinct from the accredited-provider model tracked under cl). A single national hierarchy: two self-signed roots — 'Autoridad Certificadora del Estado de Chile' (G1) and its G2 successor — anchor 710 per-organismo intermediate CAs (one or more FEA CAs per ministry, state university, regional government and public service). 712 distinct certificates (2 roots + 710 intermediates) promoted from the 2026-07-21 staging snapshot, downloaded and extracted over HTTPS by the cl-estado monitor (scripts/monitors/sources/cl-estado.mjs, human-gated). Use ALL_CERTS + getBySha256 to look certificates up. NOTE: no did.json is published for this directory — did:pki requires a two-letter country segment (did:pki:cc:...), which the 'cl-estado' pseudo-code does not satisfy; the underlying certificates remain fully usable via ALL_CERTS. RSA throughout.
